title: Bit Digital Q2 2024 Earnings: Revenue Soars 220% to $29M with Strong HPC Growth
text: Bit Digital reported Q2 2024 revenue of $29 million, representing a 220% increase year-over-year. HPC Services Revenue reached $12.5 million with 63% gross margins, accounting for 43% of total revenue. Bitcoin Mining Revenue increased 80% from the prior year to $16.1 million. Gross margin expanded by over 1,000 basis points, with gross profit reaching $13.8 million, a more than 300% increase from the prior year. The company maintained zero debt while reporting strong profitability improvements. The results demonstrate the success of Bit Digital's diversification strategy, with cloud services (HPC segment) becoming a significant revenue contributor alongside traditional bitcoin mining. The strong margin expansion reflects operational efficiency gains from the new business segments.
